title: VanillaToys+
description: A little bit more than VanillaToys
body:
# VanillaToys+ All *italic written features* are also available in [VanillaToys](https://modrinth.com/modrinth/vanillatoys).
Features
  • Zoom
  • Shaders
  • Voice chat
  • Building utilities
  • Good performance
  • Connected textures
  • Recording (ReplayMod/Flashback)
  • MCPatcher/OptiFine resource pack support
  • Connect to servers of different Minecraft versions
  • 3rd party capes (OptiFine, LabyMod, MinecraftCapes)
Pre-defined settings
  • Volume: 50%
  • Unlimited FPS
  • Zoom hotkey: C
  • Push-to-talk hotkey: V
  • Show operator item tab
  • Classic enchantment glint
  • Voice chat settings hotkey: Y
  • Load/save hotbar hotkey: none
  • Clouds
  • Narrator
  • View bobbing
  • Tutorial toasts
  • Minecraft music
  • Multiplayer warning
